title: Efficacy of AMC/DCBA lozenges for sore throat: A systematic review and meta-analysis
notes: PMID 28869700. Formulation-specific review of amylmetacresol/2,4-dichlorobenzyl alcohol lozenges for acute uncomplicated sore throat. Full text and trial-level sponsorship/conflicts were not accessible in this pass; Australian formulation availability remains unverified. Not mapped to a broad medicated-lozenge claim.
